历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 7675 → 11780 → 9810 → 8239 → 7400. In 2022, and from 2023 to 2025, it gradually recovered. The baseline for 2025 is about 7400, with a cumulative forward shift of about 4380 over the past 3 years, showing a clear warming trend. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 2021: 39 → 2022: 35 → 2023: 32 → 2024: 30 → 2025: 31, showing a gradual reduction followed by a slight rebound. The 2026 plan is 35, an increase of 4 (+12.9%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 22nd (Shandong University), stable in recent years, high school level, strong brand effect. Shandong University's reputation has been somewhat negative in recent years (2023 'study partner' incident, 2024 Sichuan enrollment gap, etc.), but the 2026 reputation document shows a moderation of the negative bias. Douyin heat total ranking 20th (high heat), high social attention, unabated application heat. Mathematics A+ (flagship), Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, and 19 other A- or above disciplines, strong disciplinary strength, strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the school's physics category enrollment majors. The province's 2026 physics category examinees are about 269,000 (up about 3.3% from 260,000 in 2025), competition slightly intensifies. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, with some cross-provincial appeal to Guangxi examinees. The school's enrollment scale in Guangxi is moderate, with 35 physics category students in 2026, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7400, the 2026 expansion of 12.9% pushing the ranking back by about 573, and the provincial physics category examinee increase of about 3.3% partially offsetting the expansion effect, while considering factors such as the school's somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin heat and strong disciplinary strength, the range is 7500–8500.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<7500), focus on reaching for the Electronic Information Experimental Class. For rankings near the upper limit (>8500), it is recommended to use Marine Science as a safety option.
